privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bcwebcam_env library_self_checkout_spl task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) and the underlying data file (spl_inventory.csv) are completely missing from the environment, making the task entirely unscorable. The expected receipt path "C:\\workspace\\tasks\\checkout_receipt.txt" exactly matches the prompt description.
